titles: "배당 10% 준다길래 샀는데 원금이 녹아있네요" SCHD·JEPI·국내 월배당 ETF의 민낯 (함정 해부) | 깊이 읽는 경제
분배율 20% 커버드콜 ETF가 15년 뒤 원금 3,357원 되는 구조 | SCHD JEPI 국내 월배당 민낯 | 깊이 읽는 경제
"월배당 12%에 속았습니다" 금감원이 2024년 경보 때린 이유 (배당 ETF 진실) | 깊이 읽는 경제
thumbnail_texts: "월배당 10%" / 녹는다는 말, 진짜? / SCHD·JEPI 속지 말자
매달 배당 꽂히는데 / 원금은 녹는다 / 금감원 경보

character_poses.1: REACT-04 깜짝 놀람 — 녹아내리는 배당 ETF 동전 더미 충격
character_poses.2: REACT-01 생각 중 — '왜 원금이 녹지?' 분배율 함정 의문 분석
character_poses.3: INTRO-03 돋보기 분석 — 금감원 경보 도장 찍힌 ETF 명세 파헤치기

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 깜짝 놀람(REACT-04). 좌측 똑똑이가 양 볼 잡고 충격, 작은 임팩트 라인 사방으로. 우측에 거대한 황금 ETF 동전 더미가 액체처럼 녹아내리는 시각화. 동전 위로 작은 배당 화살표가 또박또박 떨어지지만, 그 아래 동전 더미는 물엿처럼 흘러내림. 배당 = 원금 잠식의 비유. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, huge round eyes popping wide open in extreme shock, small pink nose, jaw dropped in disbelief, both paws pressed against the cheeks, small impact lines radiating outward. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, upper body shot. On the RIGHT side: a massive pile of golden ETF coin shapes visibly melting and dripping downward like liquid honey, with golden liquid trails pooling beneath. Above the melting pile, small downward dividend arrows fall steadily one by one, while the pile itself shrinks and flows away. Floating crimson warning glow particles surround the melting coin pile. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle red warning glow and faint financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with strong red shock atmosphere.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 생각 중(REACT-01). 좌측 똑똑이가 한 손 턱에 대고 위쪽 응시, 머리 위 작은 생각 말풍선에 물음표. 우측에 시계열 그래프 — 좌측 끝 빛나는 만 원짜리 동전(원금 10,000), 우측 끝 작아진 빨간 동전(3,357), 그 사이를 잇는 빨간 하향 곡선. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes looking upward, small pink nose, thoughtful pondering expression. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, upper body shot, one paw resting on chin in thinking pose, a small thought bubble above the head containing a single bold question mark symbol. On the RIGHT side: a time-series visualization showing on the LEFT end a large bright golden coin glowing with full intensity representing original capital, on the RIGHT end a much smaller dim red shriveled coin representing the eroded remainder, connected by a sharply downward-curving red line trail with small descending markers along its path. Soft red warning glow around the shriveled coin. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle financial grid pattern and faint red warning particles. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-left corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with strong before-after contrast.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 돋보기 분석(INTRO-03). 좌측 똑똑이가 갈색 트렌치코트와 중절모 차림으로 큰 황금 돋보기를 한 눈에 갖다 댐. 우측에 빨간 도장 찍힌 공식 경고 서류, 그 위로 빨간 알람 사이렌이 빛나고, 서류 옆에 분배율 카드 3장이 빨간 글로우로 떠 있음. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, determined detective expression wearing a brown trench coat and small fedora hat, holding a large golden magnifying glass up to one eye, examining something closely with slight forward lean. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, half body shot. On the RIGHT side: an official-looking warning document stamped with a bold crimson red seal, hovering above it a glowing red alarm siren emitting bright warning light beams. Beside the document, three small floating cards each with abstract chart icons glow with intense crimson red warning halos, suggesting inflated distribution rates. Background: deep navy blue gradient with vivid red alarm glow and faint financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with strong red warning atmosphere.
